recent_60_samples.prompt: Is the campus observatory open for volunteers tonight?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yeah, they're short, so I'll help tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sign up for the midnight breakfast event?
recent_60_samples.answer: Sorry, the deadline slipped past me yesterday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the organizer tell you about the succulent sale?
recent_60_samples.answer: She told me the pots that arrived sold quickly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know whether the board-game cafe takes reservations?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly I'm not sure they hold weekend tables.

recent_60_samples.prompt: The tutoring sessions for veterans were rescheduled again.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know whether our usual room still works?

recent_60_samples.prompt: The photography darkroom looks completely different now.
recent_60_samples.answer: Did you hear it was repainted over the weekend?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Could you find out when the planetarium projector gets fixed?
recent_60_samples.answer: Sure, let me find out whether they shipped it.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did the salsa instructor switch the lessons to Thursday evenings?
recent_60_samples.answer: Because the studio that we booked freed up only on Thursday evenings.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did the bakery move its grand opening up a week?
recent_60_samples.answer: Because the new ovens that they ordered arrived far sooner than expected.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get your bowls into the kiln?
recent_60_samples.answer: No, you can't load yours until tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Has anyone checked the rooftop hives lately?
recent_60_samples.answer: Apparently the beekeeper who tends our hives comes Friday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ever sign up for a fridge rental?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yeah, they gave me one that fits under my desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: When does the chess simul start tonight?
recent_60_samples.answer: It starts right after the dinner rush.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm hoping to grab something at the thrift pop-up today.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know if the thrift pop-up takes my card?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where do you renew your bus pass these days?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly it's quicker if you hit the kiosk downstairs.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear the comedy open mic changed locations?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yeah, they moved our open mic to the back lounge.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the climbing staff tell you about the belay test?
recent_60_samples.answer: The desk worker told me to go find out the schedule myself.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Is the community fridge stocked this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: Volunteers refilled our shelves an hour ago.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your herb spiral looks a little dry today.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know if we should water it tonight?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your drone club posted a new meeting time.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know if our slot was moved to Thursdays?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you need anything before the archery range?
recent_60_samples.answer: You sign a waiver at the desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Has the zine library reopened yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I was wondering when it reopens after break.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you seen the campus cat around today?
recent_60_samples.answer: No, someone said it was taken to the vet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you make it to the silent disco?
recent_60_samples.answer: No, they'd moved our disco to the gym already.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get your laptop working again?
recent_60_samples.answer: I'm not sure whether the fix-it clinic accepts laptops that won't start.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you finished your mural yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: The mural we started last week looks almost done.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why do those stargazing talks fill up fast?
recent_60_samples.answer: The room only seats about twenty people.

recent_60_samples.prompt: The kombucha workshop filled up so quickly.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know whether they saved me a spot?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you going to the gym tonight?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yeah, I might swim a few laps later.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your campus garden looks really lush this spring.
recent_60_samples.answer: Volunteers watered the beds an hour ago.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm thinking of joining the service trip this year.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I sign up for the trip?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your TA say about the worksheet?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if mine was due.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the librarian tell you about that loan?
recent_60_samples.answer: She told me the book that I borrowed is overdue.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did the bike workshop move to the basement?
recent_60_samples.answer: Because the workshop needed more storage space.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you registered for the careers workshop yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: No, the link has not been emailed to me.

recent_60_samples.prompt: The orientation desk closed before I got there.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know whether they reopen tonight?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your roommate keeps practicing piano late at night.
recent_60_samples.answer: I was wondering when they end quiet hours.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the advisor say about your transfer credits?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly she told me to email the registrar.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are the salsa lessons still on Friday evening?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yes, the instructor confirmed our usual slot.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the recycling bins finally arrive in our dorm?
recent_60_samples.answer: No, the bins we ordered keep getting delayed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm hoping to catch the last shuttle to downtown.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know when the shuttle leaves tonight?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you tried that new coffee place by the quad?
recent_60_samples.answer: Not yet, but a classmate said the lattes were great.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your dance club moved their meeting room again.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know if our reservation still works?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Has the writing center moved to the library?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yeah, they relocated upstairs over the weekend.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where can I drop off the donated textbooks?
recent_60_samples.answer: The drop box outside the office accepts them.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ever join the volleyball intramurals?
recent_60_samples.answer: No, the deadline closed before I decided.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the coach say about the swim trials?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know whether the pool was reserved.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your study lounge looks pretty packed this morning.
recent_60_samples.answer: Yeah, midterms are starting next week here.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Mariana tell you about the bookstore hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: Mariana said our bookstore opens at nine sharp.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I think Mariana mentioned a conference on linguistics.
recent_60_samples.answer: When does Olivia leave for our conference?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finally try Hector's homemade dumplings?
recent_60_samples.answer: Hector said our new spice blend was perfect.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear what Margot decided about the mixer?
recent_60_samples.answer: Margot needed to know if my venue is booked.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Julian tell you about the lab partnership?
recent_60_samples.answer: Julian hasn't told me whether the lab opens tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Alison ask you after the poster session?
recent_60_samples.answer: Alison wondered if you took the printed handouts.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you skip the budget meeting yesterday?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly, Juan needed help moving into his apartment.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where can you pick up the new student handbooks?
recent_60_samples.answer: Your handbooks were quietly left at the front desk by Naomi this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you met Diane, the new graduate TA?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yeah, Diane currently runs the study sessions that I joined last week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard Professor Cho announced a new research scholarship.
recent_60_samples.answer: Did Angelina submit our grant application on time?
